디모데후서 3:1.content: But know this: that in the last days, grievous times will come.

디모데후서 3:2.content: For men will be lovers of self, lovers of money, boastful, arrogant, blasphemers, disobedient to parents, unthankful, unholy,

디모데후서 3:3.content: without natural affection, unforgiving, slanderers, without self-control, fierce, not lovers of good,

디모데후서 3:4.content: traitors, headstrong, conceited, lovers of pleasure rather than lovers of God,

디모데후서 3:5.content: holding a form of godliness, but having denied its power. Turn away from these, also.

디모데후서 3:6.content: For some of these are people who creep into houses and take captive gullible women loaded down with sins, led away by various lusts,

디모데후서 3:7.content: always learning, and never able to come to the knowledge of the truth.

디모데후서 3:8.content: Even as Jannes and Jambres opposed Moses, so these also oppose the truth, men corrupted in mind, who concerning the faith are rejected.

디모데후서 3:9.content: But they will proceed no further. For their folly will be evident to all men, as theirs also came to be.

디모데후서 3:10.content: But you followed my teaching, conduct, purpose, faith, patience, love, steadfastness,

디모데후서 3:11.content: persecutions, and sufferings: those things that happened to me at Antioch, Iconium, and Lystra. I endured those persecutions. The Lord delivered me out of them all.

디모데후서 3:12.content: Yes, and all who desire to live godly in Christ Jesus will suffer persecution.

디모데후서 3:13.content: But evil men and impostors will grow worse and worse, deceiving and being deceived.

디모데후서 3:14.content: But you remain in the things which you have learned and have been assured of, knowing from whom you have learned them.

디모데후서 3:15.content: From infancy, you have known the holy Scriptures which are able to make you wise for salvation through faith, which is in Christ Jesus.

디모데후서 3:16.content: Every Scripture is God-breathed and profitable for teaching, for reproof, for correction, and for instruction in righteousness,

디모데후서 3:17.content: that each person who belongs to God may be complete, thoroughly equipped for every good work.
